creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best ramen restaurant in Copenhagen? ⭐️

I went to this little ramen restaurant on the warmest day of the year at 3 in the afternoon, so there was only another couple here, but I think this place is going to get pretty popular soon 🙌

The restaurant is located on the main street in Valby - you can either get there on the S-train (the station is called Valby) or walk from Vesterbro if it’s a nice day 🥰

Save this place for your trip to Copenhagen 🤝

📍Ramen Hokkaido 👉 @ramenhokkaido 

#copenhagenfood #copenhagenlife

transcription.text: This is my new favorite ramen place in Copenhagen. This restaurant opened a couple of months ago and I feel like it's still a proper hidden gem that not a lot of people know about but that probably won't last long because the food here was pretty amazing to be honest. I got chatting to the owner who said he'd been traveling around trying the best ramen restaurants in Europe to find the perfect recipe and I gotta give it to the man this was probably the best spicy tonkotsu ramen I've had here in Copenhagen. We also tried these little Japanese fried octopus balls and had a bit of fried duck on the side but it was the ramen that really made our visit here memorable. Get here before it gets too popular guys.
